ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot mimicking the movement of a monorail, emphasizing the smooth, gliding motion.  The arms will move in a coordinated manner, suggesting the forward momentum and rhythmic movement of the train.  The animation will focus on the robot's arms, creating a visual metaphor for the monorail's movement. The robot's lack of elbows means that the arm's movements will be more sweeping and less articulated than a human's. We will use a combination of joint1 and joint2 to create a fluid, wave-like arm motion.

frames.beat: arms hang low, a monorail at rest
arms sweep forward and up, gaining momentum
arms dip slightly, a rhythmic sway
arms extend forward, the monorail glides smoothly
